response.justification: Bogdan brings 16+ years of software development experience with a strong TypeScript/Node.js foundation, hands-on AI agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq, and a demonstrated testing culture through TDD practice and workshop creation. He covers most of the required stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker/Kubernetes — and his breadth across embedded, mobile, web, and backend shows genuine full-stack depth. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js and Vitest experience (both central to the primary stack) and no mention of Kotlin, but his track record of picking up new tools quickly and the recency of his AI-agent work make him a compelling candidate worth interviewing.
strengths: Direct AI agent and MCP framework experience at re:cinq, matching the job's AI agent development requirement precisely
Deep TypeScript/Node.js history across Optilyz, RIDE Capital, and re:cinq with AWS CDK, React, MongoDB, and Docker/Kubernetes all confirmed
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, created testing workshops, built a D-language test runner — indicates the kind of quality discipline the role demands
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, which is the primary backend framework in the stack — a notable gap that would need to be assessed in interview
Vitest and Playwright are absent from the resume; testing experience leans toward older or language-specific frameworks rather than the specified modern JS toolchain
Currently in a career gap (since October 2025) and the most recent engineering role was only six months long, which may raise questions about continuity and recency of hands-on delivery
